label: 房间掩码初始化
description: 根据室内空间网格和门位置网格，初始化家具布局所需的 maskA（家具实体占用）和 maskB（门口过道预留）两张掩码。
description-en: Initializes maskA (furniture body occupancy) and maskB (door aisle reservation) from a room interior grid and a door position grid.
icon: 扁平插画风格图标。画面中央是一个简洁的方形房间平面图轮廓，房间内部有两张半透明叠加的网格层，一层用浅紫色表示家具占用区，另一层用浅橙色表示过道预留区。房间下边缘有一个缺口代表门洞。主色调为浅紫色和浅橙色，背景为白色，线条简洁清晰。

inputs.name: roomGrid
inputs.label: 室内空间网格
inputs.description: 房间可用区域网格，1=可放置格子，0=墙/其他
inputs.description-en: Room interior grid: 1 = walkable cell, 0 = wall or outside.

inputs.name: doorGrid
inputs.label: 门位置网格
inputs.description: 门格位置网格，1=门格，0=其他；尺寸须与室内空间网格完全相同
inputs.description-en: Door position grid: 1 = door cell, 0 = other; must have the same size as roomGrid.

outputs.name: maskA
outputs.label: 家具实体掩码 (maskA)
outputs.description: 家具实体占用掩码，初始全零；将来由家具放置算法写入非零 rank 值
outputs.description-en: Furniture body occupancy mask, initially all zeros; populated by the placement algorithm with non-zero rank values.

outputs.name: maskB
outputs.label: 过道预留掩码 (maskB)
outputs.description: 过道预留掩码，门格的四邻格标为1，防止家具堵塞门口；始终为0/1二值网格
outputs.description-en: Aisle reservation mask; the four neighbors of each door cell are set to 1 to keep doorways clear. Always a binary 0/1 grid.
